Dame Jenni Murray, former BBC Woman's Hour presenter, dies at 75She was the Radio 4 programme's longest-serving presenter, having left in 2020 after 33 years. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cpwj8e25ddgo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cpwj8e25ddgo#0 Fri, 20 Mar 2026 18:34:23 GMT
Iranian man arrested trying to enter Faslane nuclear baseA 34-year-old man and a 31-year-old woman were arrested at HM Naval Base Clyde, which houses UK's nuclear-armed submarines, on Thursday. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c80mej47xz0o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c80mej47xz0o#0 Fri, 20 Mar 2026 16:03:24 GMT
Work from home and drive more slowly to save energy, global body urgesPeople should change how they travel, work and cook to tackle the energy price crisis, the International Energy Agency says. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg4540d0g4o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg4540d0g4o#0 Fri, 20 Mar 2026 15:05:03 GMT
Chuck Norris, martial artist and Hollywood movie star, dies aged 86The actor was known for Walker, Texas Ranger and The Way of the Dragon films - and numerous online memes. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0le8e5jg1xo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0le8e5jg1xo#0 Fri, 20 Mar 2026 18:40:34 GMT
Reform suspends Scotland candidate less than a day after he was announcedScotland leader Malcolm Offord told BBC Radio Scotland that the party had "spent a lot of time on vetting" candidates https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cj375v264rko?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cj375v264rko#0 Fri, 20 Mar 2026 16:02:12 GMT
'I feel so grateful to be alive,' says Kent University meningitis survivorAnnabelle Mackay, 21, has spoken to the BBC about her experience surviving meningitis. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cp3ld6dq4d1o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cp3ld6dq4d1o#0 Fri, 20 Mar 2026 16:31:06 GMT
Private mental health unit 'failed women who died'Three women died at a private clinic where staff were not carrying out proper checks. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c74vjlnxd58o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c74vjlnxd58o#0 Fri, 20 Mar 2026 17:38:41 GMT
Tenerife hit by snow as Storm Therese brings wind and rain to Canary IslandsAuthorities in Tenerife have activated their emergency plans with roads closed and events cancelled as weather warnings are in force. https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/cr51n7yd7v5o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/weather/articles/cr51n7yd7v5o#0 Fri, 20 Mar 2026 13:26:59 GMT
